name: Chicken Puff Bravo
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Velveeta Mexican Pasteurized Process Cheese Spread with Jalapeno Pepper, cubed
2 - 10 oz pkg frozen chopped spinach, thawed, well drained
1/4 cup Chopped red or green bell pepper
2 8 oz cans refrigerated quick crescent dinner rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine the process cheese, sour cream, and garlic salt. Stir over low heat until the cheese is melted. Remove from heat.
2. Beat egg yolks thoroughly; reserve 1 tablespoon for glaze. Gradually stir in the remaining egg yolks into the cheese mixture. Cool.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form; fold into the cheese mixture.
4. Add the remaining ingredients, except dough; mix lightly.
5. Unroll one can of dough and press it into the bottom and sides of a greased 12-inch oven-proof skillet, pressing perforations together to seal.
6. Spread spinach mixture over the dough.
7. Unroll the second can of dough and separate into eight triangles. Loosely twist each triangle at the pointed end.
8. Arrange dough triangles on the spinach mixture, pointing ends towards the center.
9. Seal outer edges to crust.
10. Brush dough with the reserved egg yolk.
11. Bake at 375 degrees for 35 to 40 minutes or until the egg mixture is set. Makes 8 servings.
